allow: Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -D /tmp/finance-headers.txt -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{"tools":{}},"clientInfo":{"name":"smoke-test","version":"0"}}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=[l for l in sys.stdin if l.startswith\('data:'\)]; d=json.loads\(lines[0][5:]\); [print\('-', t['name'], '—', \(t.get\('description',''\) or ''\)[:60]\) for t in d['result']['tools']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=[l for l in sys.stdin if l.startswith\('data:'\)]; d=json.loads\(lines[0][5:]\); [print\('-', t['name'], '—', \(t.get\('description',''\) or ''\).split\(chr\(10\)\)[0][:70]\) for t in d['result']['tools']]")
